title: abicheck agent-eval task manifest
description: Schema for agent-evals/tasks/<task-name>/manifest.yaml — a behavioral coding-agent evaluation task (CLAUDE.md M1-5). See agent-evals/README.md for the full contract.

name.description: Task identifier. Must match the containing directory name.

description.description: One-line human summary of what the task asks the agent to do.

base_commit.description: Full 40-character git commit SHA the task is scored against. The agent's working tree must start here.

prompt.description: The instruction given to the agent under evaluation, verbatim.

allowed_paths.description: Glob patterns (relative to repo root) the agent's diff must stay within. A change touching a path outside this list fails scoring regardless of hidden-test outcome.

required_checks.description: scripts/verify.py profile names the agent's change must pass (e.g. "pr") before hidden tests are even run.

hidden_tests.description: Paths (relative to this task directory) to pytest files the agent never sees, run after required_checks pass.

forbidden.description: Named actions that fail the task immediately if detected, independent of whether hidden tests pass — see README.md for the meaning of each tag.

timeout_seconds.description: Wall-clock budget for the agent's attempt. Optional; the runner applies a default if omitted.
